ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Cosmic Abyssal Nebula
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Semi-translucent deep midnight blue and violet swirls.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: The Enchanted Grove
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Crystal-clear resin on the top half, seamlessly fading into a smoky, moss-green opaque base.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Eldritch Horizon
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Murky, translucent teal with dark tendrils of opaque black alcohol ink cutting sharply through the center.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Gilded Archive
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Swirled warm amber, rich honey, and cream-colored resin designed to mimic the look of aged, weathered parchment.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Synthwave Overdrive
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A sharp, clean diagonal split—one half vibrant translucent magenta, the other half electric cyan.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: The Reliquary
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: Translucent or semi-translucent dark purple resin, filled with swirling crimson and black smoke effects.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Crimson Nebula Liquid Core
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A translucent deep red and swirling purple resin D20 houses a swirling liquid core filled with iridescent glitter dust.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Caustic Slime Aberration
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A translucent, split half-and-half resin d20 swirling with toxic green and sickly purple, featuring embedded gold foil flakes that catch the light like shimmering bile.

ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.label: Orange Cream Swirl D20
ShinyMathRocks.DiceThemeDef.description: A sharp-edged D20 crafted from translucent orange glass suspended with opaque white cream swirls and distinct melting globules.
